title: AR's OreUI - Dark
description: Resource Pack based on leaked GUI update, but Dark
body:
# AR's OreUI(AmongstReality's OreUI) Dark

[![AR's OreUI on Modrinth](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/compact/modrinth@2x.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ars-oreui-dark)
[![AR's OreUI on CurseForge](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/compact/curseforge@2x.png?raw=true)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/ars-oreui-dark)
[![amongstreality on Patreon](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/compact/patreon@2x.png?raw=true)](https://www.patreon.com/c/AmongstReality)
[![amongstreality on Buy Me a Coffee](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/compact/bmc@2x.png?raw=true)](https://buymeacoffee.com/amongstreality)

I've seen a [leak](https://x.com/xKingDarkYT/status/1873038637899890855) of a new ui for Bedrock, watched some videos and decided to make my own version of it.

<details>
<summary>Previews</summary>

![Preview 1 Dark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SJlpTKqV/images/30e1f0be3359a83803588cb8b326a4870d4598e2.jpeg)
![Preview 2 Dark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SJlpTKqV/images/21e7585143936bd619ff99027ec234380cfcb235.jpeg)
![Preview 3 Dark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LWYaLBiL/images/2c423bd2bd69da69c55416501dac6f86dbbd6bfa.jpeg)
![Preview 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SJlpTKqV/images/ad0977b0053282460f83fb3701ad5c906380b3e2.png)
![Preview 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SJlpTKqV/images/3ab2debb3ff90c2c184c421eebaf723f136a191f.png)
![Preview 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SJlpTKqV/images/de93053e919543545d60cab641cdca7870087451.jpeg)

</details>

### Light mode

If you want a Light version of the pack, you can get it here - [AR's OreUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ars-oreui).

> ❗ **Important:** the resource pack REQUIRES [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui). If you don't use it, chest, trapped chest, ender chest and barrel will have the same generic texture.

> ⚠️ The resource pack itself is made for 1.21.2+ versions of Minecraft. It probably will work on 1.20.2-1.21.1, but since highlighted slot texture can't be changed on these versions, it'll look a little weird in this aspect. If you don't care, then you can use it on 1.20.2-1.21.1.

> ⚠️ **Warning:** this resource pack is only available for download on Modrinth and CurseForge and has its own page on [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/ar-s-ore-ui-dark/). If you find it on any other platform - **do not download it** from them, because they redistribute it unofficially and unauthorized. The download links may lead to malicious websites and the content you download may contain viruses.

## You can support me and my projects here:

[![Patreon](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/labeled/patreon@3x.png?raw=true)](https://www.patreon.com/c/AmongstReality)
[![Buy Me a Coffee](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/labeled/bmc@3x.png?raw=true)](https://buymeacoffee.com/amongstreality)

## Mod Support

- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- [Better Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-advancements)
- [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
- [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)

<summary>Terms of use</summary>

When you can use my assets:

- In public Modpacks on Modrinth/CurseForge.
- If you want to add mod support as an addon for the resource pack. If you do that, you have to add clear credit that
  includes links to the original resource pack.
- Any private modifications of the original resource pack.

When you can **NOT** use my assets:

- Distribution on the Bedrock Marketplace.
- Locking behind a paywall (e.g. Patreon).
- Distribution of original/modified assets on any platforms.

Links to the resource pack's pages on different platforms:

- [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/ars-oreui-dark)
- [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ars-oreui-dark)

</details>
